name: store-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker for Store checkout, orders, inventory, shipping, tax, emails, and admin APIs

scripts.dev: ruby ../scripts/sync-worker-config.rb && ruby ../scripts/generate-catalog-snapshot.rb && (node src/local-repo-service.mjs & LOCAL_REPO_PID=$!; trap 'kill $LOCAL_REPO_PID >/dev/null 2>&1 || true' EXIT INT TERM; wrangler dev --env dev --ip 127.0.0.1 --port 8989)
